Headline: International Journal of Greenhouse Gas Control
Description: The International Journal of Greenhouse Gas Control is a monthly  scientific journal covering industry research on greenhouse gas control through carbon capture and storage at large stationary emitters in the power sector and in other major resource, manufacturing and production industries.

Headline: Frederick Chiluba
Description: Frederick Jacob Titus Chiluba (30 April 1943 – 18 June 2011) was a Zambian politician who was the second president of Zambia from 1991 to 2002. Chiluba, a trade union leader, won the country's multi-party presidential election in 1991 as the candidate of the Movement for Multi-party Democracy (MMD), defeating long-time President Kenneth Kaunda. He was re-elected in 1996. As he was unable to run for a third term in 2001, former Vice President Levy Mwanawasa instead ran as the MMD candidate and succeeded him. After leaving office, Chiluba was the subject of a long investigation and trial regarding alleged corruption; he was eventually acquitted in 2009.

Headline: Juguang, Lienchiang
Description: Juguang Township / Jyuguang Township,[3][4][5][a] also spelled Chukuang, is a rural township of Lienchiang County (the Matsu Islands) located in the Republic of China's Fuchien Province. Juguang Township includes two major islands, Dongju Island (東莒 "East Ju"; Dĕ̤ng-gṳ̄) and Xiju Island (西莒 "West Ju"; Să̤-gṳ̄),[6] as well as some islets. The islands are also claimed by the People's Republic of China as Meihua Town[b][7] located in Changle City, Fuzhou within its own Fujian Province.

Headline: Mayer, Minnesota
Description: Mayer (/ˈmeɪər/ MAY-ər) is a city in Carver County, Minnesota, United States, along the South Fork of the Crow River.  The population was 2,453 at the 2020 census.
